summary: Iteration 173 - Admin Precision Queue & Photographer Verification System COMPLETE. Backend: All 13 tests passed. Frontend: Admin Console Queue tab verified with 20 flagged spots, Snap Offshore buttons, Flagged/Suggestions sub-tabs. All API endpoints working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminPrecisionQueue.js correctly implements Queue tab with Flagged/Suggestions sub-tabs
SpotVerificationNudge.js correctly shows verification prompt for photographer roles only
Community Verified badge logic (5+ yes votes) implemented in spot_admin.py lines 599-602
UnifiedSpotDrawer.js integrates SpotVerificationNudge component at line 1567-1572
Community Verified badge displays in drawer header at lines 1484-1489 with data-testid='community-verified-badge'
seed_data_creation: None - used existing flagged spots (20 spots in queue)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 173 verified Admin Precision Queue and Photographer Verification System. Queue tab shows 20 flagged spots with 'unverified' status. Snap Offshore button moves spot coordinates. Verification endpoints work: POST /api/spots/verification/{spot_id} for votes, GET /api/spots/verification/{spot_id}/status for status. Community Verified badge requires 5+ yes votes. SpotVerificationNudge shows for photographer roles (Hobbyist, Photographer, Approved Pro).
